indication: Treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) previously treated with crizotinib.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved ceritinib for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) previously treated with crizotinib, and whose ALK rearrangement has been demonstrated by an accurate and validated test method.

document.name: Ceritinib Monotherapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Ceritinib Monotherapy, 2026, version number 4, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6917/340_Ceritinib_monotherapy.pdf
